# Indian Regulatory MCP

> SEBI orders & circulars, RBI notifications, MCA company lookup, NSE corp announcements, AMFI NAV, GSTIN check

This MCP server exposes 8 tools via the Model Context Protocol (JSON-RPC 2.0 over HTTP POST). It runs on Cloudflare Workers and is billed via Dodo Payments. Authenticated via `Authorization: Bearer <api_key>` obtained by subscribing at `https://indian-regulatory-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/upgrade`.

## Endpoint
- MCP JSON-RPC: https://indian-regulatory-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/mcp
- Health: https://indian-regulatory-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/health
- Landing page: https://indian-regulatory-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/
- Get API key: https://indian-regulatory-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/upgrade?tier=solo

## Tools
- `sebi_orders`: SEBI orders (adjudication, settlement, prohibitory, recovery, WTM) by date + category.
- `sebi_circulars`: SEBI circulars filtered by topic substring + date.
- `rbi_circulars`: RBI notifications/circulars by topic + date.
- `rbi_press_release`: RBI press releases by date.
- `mca_company`: MCA company lookup by CIN: name, status, capital, directors.
- `gst_verify`: Structurally validate a GSTIN (state code + PAN + entity-sequence + Mod-36 check).
- `nse_corp_announcements`: NSE corporate announcements for a ticker (Indian equivalent of 8-K).
- `amfi_nav`: Daily NAV for an Indian mutual fund scheme by AMFI scheme code.

## Authentication
Pass `Authorization: Bearer <api_key>` on POST /mcp. Free tier: anonymous, 100 calls / month / IP.

## Pricing
- Free: 100 calls / month (anonymous, no signup)
- Solo $9/mo: 2,000 calls / month, 60/min
- Team $29/mo: 10,000 calls / month, 200/min, 5 team seats
- Pro $79/mo: 50,000 calls / month, 600/min, 25 team seats
Billed via Dodo Payments (merchant-of-record). Cancel anytime.

## Account management
- View account: GET https://indian-regulatory-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/account (Bearer)
- Rotate key: POST https://indian-regulatory-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/account/rotate (Bearer)
- GDPR data export: GET https://indian-regulatory-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/account/export (Bearer)
- Team management (Team+): https://indian-regulatory-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/account/team
